package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for large_csv_or_json_export_without_bufio: Export data written in loops without visible buffering in handlers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule321NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule321NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule321NegativeRecord) (Rule321NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario321Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule321NegativeService, input Rule321NegativeRecord) (Rule321NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule321NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
